title: caladenia coactilis
intro: Caladenia coactilis, also known as the delicate spider orchid, is a species of orchid native to Western Australia. It has been traditionally used by Indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat colds, fever, and skin conditions. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may provide health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions or as a tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
